problem: What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown
hypothesis: Magnetohydrodynamic flow without moving parts may resolve What is dark matter composed of — 27% of universe is unknown by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
